---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement or new capability
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem

What user problem would this solve?

## Proposed Solution

What should Note Pilot do?

## Why This Belongs In The Plugin

Why should this be part of Note Pilot instead of a prompt template, provider setting, or external tool?

## Provider Or Vault Impact

Does this change affect any of these?

- [ ] Model provider requests
- [ ] API keys or credentials
- [ ] Vault file creation/modification
- [ ] Terminal setup commands
- [ ] Webviews
- [ ] Documentation only

## Safety And Privacy Notes

Would this send more note content to a provider, install tools, or change files automatically?

## Alternatives Considered

What other approaches did you consider?
